textByHash.0f03a93e327291a0bcb0b1c60f2fda55f5343800: Scrubfoot needs a minute before moving.
textByHash.25043b2bf07acb0ef261f8f0c030801570117513: Scrubfoot busy. Must scrub generals' feet.
textByHash.9a15a3dde5a83a36b45c1ede88506908415b5905: Over by water there is crack in the wall.
textByHash.b709dd9cd9b2566a781c209397f42e8357be6567: It not matter. If Scrubfoot get green fireflies, General Bentnoze kick Scrubfoot. If not get green fireflies, General Wartface kick Scrubfoot.
textByHash.cd98f296167f19f2af1b1ec3d6bdf917686e269b: General Wartface send Scrubfoot to get green glowy flying things.
textByHash.d00f263e50f2cda1d99d483f077bd8187a51ab66: That it is. It also dangerous business going back to generals without glowy flying things.
